target.implementationScope: Add read-only test display populated from actual GetConfig index 000.
nonGoals: Do not change other SMART-51 modules.

allowedScope.expectedFlow: SMART-51 Factory Printer OnClick_btnGetConfig clears the field, reads index 000, and displays the value in the separate test field.

flows.reason: The user confirmed the test field must not set hardware values.
The user confirmed save/load and other features are excluded.

flows.flow: P51ITEM_ADDING_INIT2 normal m_Items registration for test
flows.reason: Normal item registration risks unintended Set/save/load/report participation.

flows.flow: CPConfigDlg routing and device wrapper behavior
flows.reason: The request is local to the SMART-51 Factory Printer GetConfig display path.

nonGoals: No changes to other SMART-51 modules.

nodes.intentClaim: Read SMART-51 Factory index 000 during real GetConfig and display it without Set/save/load participation.
The SMART-51 test display must not participate in Set, save/load, report/export, or unrelated module behavior.
A bounded hardware-validated SMART-51 test display was implemented, confirmed, then reverted by user request.

edgeIntents.claim: The change was allowed only as a read-only projection of index 000 during GetConfig.
Future maintenance must not resurrect the reverted test field through Set/save/load/report or unrelated module paths.

remainingRisks: No active CardPrinterConfig behavior remains from this test change.
The report remains useful as a validated retrofit PBE lifecycle example.
A future reimplementation should start from this record and still require explicit user approval.
nextAllowedActions: Use this record as a schema/validator fixture.
Reimplement only if the user explicitly requests the SMART-51 test display again.
